maxOrderAmount.description: Maximum base amount to trade per cycle; live balance/capacity can reduce the executed amount

mode.description: Capital/volume tradeoff mode. Defaults to balanced.

dailyVolumeTarget.description: Optional quote-volume cap for the session

tradeAmountVariance.description: Fractional variance applied to selected cycle quantity

priceOffsetVariance.description: Fractional variance applied to maker price offset

cycleMode.description: Cycle role mode. Unified direct orders default to alternating.

dynamicRoleSwitching.description: Switch maker/taker roles dynamically based on balances. Unified direct orders default to true.

strategyContract.description: Unified Efficient Dual Account Volume backend contract marker

makerAccountLabel.description: Maker account label injected by admin direct start

takerAccountLabel.description: Taker account label injected by admin direct start

pair.description: Pair alias injected by admin direct start

exchangeName.description: Exchange injected by admin direct start

userId.description: Runtime user id injected by admin direct start

clientId.description: Runtime client/order id injected by admin direct start

marketMakingOrderId.description: Runtime market-making order id injected by admin direct start
